summary: Completed testing of Settings page 4-column layout, task definitions API, event form with event_type dropdown, and announcement overlaps endpoint. All features working correctly.

minor.issue: Route was defined after /api/events/{event_id} causing 404 - FIXED by moving route before parameterized route

passed_tests: 1. GET /api/smm/tasks-definition returns all 5 arrays: management, smm, marketing, monthly, daily
2. Management column has 15 tasks sorted by days_before desc (35 to -1)
3. SMM column has 30 tasks sorted by days_before desc (30 to -1)
4. Marketing column has 2 tasks sorted by days_before desc (17 and 5)
5. Monthly tasks have column badges (МНЖ, SMM, МКТ) for management, smm, marketing
6. GET /api/smm/announcement-overlaps returns JSON object (currently empty - no overlapping announcements)
7. Event creation supports all 3 event_types: new, regular, repeat
8. GET /api/events/past-unique returns list of unique past events for repeat selection
9. Google Calendar status endpoint works correctly
10. Settings page (desktop modal) shows 4 columns: менеджмент, smm, маркетинг, автоматизація
11. Settings 4th column shows Google Calendar connection status and monthly tasks list
12. Event form dropdown has 3 options: нова подія, регулярна, повтор
13. Selecting 'регулярна' shows weekday selector (7 days: понеділок through неділя)
14. Selecting 'повтор' opens past events dialog with list of unique past events
15. Main dashboard shows 4 columns: ПОДІЇ, SMM, МЕНЕДЖМЕНТ, МАРКЕТИНГ
critical_code_review_comments: SettingsContent component correctly implements 4-column grid layout (line 3942)
Monthly tasks correctly display column badges (МНЖ, SMM, МКТ) based on task.column field
EventForm correctly handles event_type dropdown with 3 options (new, regular, repeat)
Backend MANAGEMENT_TASKS has 15 tasks, SMM_TASKS has 30 tasks, MARKETING_TASKS has 2 tasks
MONTHLY_TASKS correctly includes column field for badge display
announcement-overlaps endpoint correctly checks for is_announcement flag in SMM_TASKS
seed_data_creation: None - used existing events and tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working: 1) Settings page has 4 columns (менеджмент, smm, маркетинг, автоматизація). 2) 4th column shows Google Calendar status and monthly tasks with column badges. 3) Management has 15 tasks, SMM has 30 tasks, Marketing has 2 tasks - all sorted by days_before desc. 4) Event form has event_type dropdown with 3 options. 5) 'регулярна' shows 7-day weekday selector. 6) 'повтор' opens past events dialog. 7) announcement-overlaps endpoint returns empty object (no overlaps currently). Fixed route order bug for /api/events/past-unique.
